scenarioLine: You arrive at a Dutch birthday. Everyone is sitting in a circle.

options.text: Alleen de jarige. (Only the birthday person.)
Iedereen in de kring. (Everyone in the circle.)
Niemand. Je gaat gewoon zitten. (No one. You just sit down.)

reveal: Correct: B. In the Netherlands you congratulate everyone, not just the birthday person. You go around the circle: 'Gefeliciteerd met je zus!' (Congrats on your sister!). It feels strange the first time. After that, you are the one who knows the custom.
